findings.description: The note adds "（サーバへのリクエストは送信されない）" as a parenthetical, but this phrase does not appear anywhere in the source file. The source only states that in local operation the browser navigates to the dummyUri; it never explicitly says server requests are not sent.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「タブクリック時にはdummyUrlで指定されたJSPファイルに遷移する。」— no mention of server request suppression.
